approval_basis: Leo go-ahead 2026-06-30 (본 train 지시) — §11 descriptive condition mapping 포함 승인
intent: Foundation dev/shadow HTTP service의 JUDGE/REC 응답을 evidence-rich하게 개선. ★결정론(LLM 0)·web/learning 0·api_live=false·real write 0. backward compatible.
scope: foundation_http_service/core.py JUDGE/REC/answer-composer + 테스트 확장 + contract additive 문서화

decision_product_policy.do_not_recommend/caution: products + caution reason + confirm 필요 정보

safety_rules: risk = max(structured, keyword) · case-insensitive · 타입가드 유지
condition_detection: 결정론 descriptive 키워드 사전(검색·설명 보조, safety 판단 아님). safety는 기존 _kw_risk fail-closed escalation 유지. no-heuristics: 본 설계로 승인.
backward_compatible: 기존 필드 전부 유지(decision_type/safety_gate_result/evidence_mode/reason_codes/answer_summary/clarification_questions/product_refs + 불변식). 새 필드 추가만.
test_plan: 기존 20/20 유지 + 신규 ~20(enriched recommend/condition summary/caution/do_not_recommend reason/block products 0/pregnancy·adverse block/hold questions/catalog 0/catalog-out 0/REC⊆input/PII mask/uppercase risk/risk_signal guard/health invariants/raw 0/memory 0/real write 0/contract valid/service starts)
rollback: core.py 변경 → 커밋 revert + 8731 재기동. 제품 repo 영향 0.
